documentTitle: AEM Career Playbook — companies, apply tips & interview prep (India)

disclaimer.summaryLine: Research notes — not official. Info can be wrong or outdated; always check the company's careers page yourself.
lines: Built while job searching and shared to help other AEM folks. Not affiliated with Adobe or any employer listed here, and not a guarantee of openings. Data can be incomplete or wrong — always confirm on the employer careers page.

This is not a company ranking — every place has pros and cons. "Frequent" means they often post AEM roles, not that they're hiring right now. Links are snapshots and may move. Keep learning and use whatever approach works for you.

community.heading: Community
community.note: LinkedIn groups worth checking — not run by this site, Adobe, or listed employers. Join if the rules fit you; don't spam your resume in discussions.

purpose.intro: Useful when you're applying now — or just keeping sharp:
points: Learn from interview gaps instead of only memorising answers.
Keep LinkedIn and Naukri current so recruiters see accurate availability, skills, and experience.
Periodically review interview questions or take an interview when you are genuinely open to exploring a role.
Companies, apply steps, learning links, and interview prep work best together.

hero.title: AEM companies, apply tips, and interview prep (India)
hero.body: ~298 AEM employers, apply steps for LinkedIn and Naukri, plus learning links and interview topics. Filter by India hiring and AEM Cloud — then open apply steps when you need them.
